The '''arbalest''' was a projectile [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]]<ref name="Weapons" /> typically carried by the [[Militiagung/Legends|militiagungs]] of the [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Gungan Grand Army]]<ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. The [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Tobler Ceel/Legends|Tobler Ceel]] established a [[Scrumma Jawbone training center|training center]] in the [[Scrumma Jawbone]], an arm of [[Lake Paonga/Legends|Lake Paonga]], where militiagungs could practice with arbalests alongside other weapons such as the [[Cesta/Legends|cesta]] and [[Atlatl/Legends|atlatl]].<ref name="Weapons" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arbalests were first mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'', a reference book by [[W. Haden Blackman]] published in [[2004]].<ref name="Weapons" />
